notes.text: First real alignment conversation. Ken confirmed he wants to build something around Deryl. Discussed executive assistant role, Puerto Rico trial week, concierge business, luxury tours, boat rentals, Airbnb/Turo arbitrage. Ken proposed acquiring an existing concierge company. Financial reality shared openly — $33k debt, $4k cash, summer earning potential $5-10k/month. Decision: finish summer at Buddy's, stack cash, then transition. May 5th follow-up set to discuss compensation and timing.

growth_log.title: Ken Wilkins alignment conversation — 1hr 20min
growth_log.summary: First real alignment conversation. Ken confirmed he wants to build something around Deryl. Role = EA + ops partner + business builder in Puerto Rico. Trial week proposed. Next meeting May 5.
action_items: Define timing decision — finish summer vs earlier
Follow up with Jesse re: equity

growth_log.text: Ken conversation happened. He was genuinely moved by the alignment presentation. Said he's been thinking about how to build a business around me. Trial week in Puerto Rico proposed. May 5th follow-up set. This is real.

The North Star crystallized: build the skills, money, and character — then go back and give it. Marshfield isn't where I settle. It's where I serve. That distinction changes everything. I come back with something to give, not somewhere to retreat to.

The speaker vision has been there since childhood. The 2018 high school video triggered it. I've always been called to lead and pour back into people. Everything I'm building — Ken, Puerto Rico, hospitality, boats — is the path to having something worth giving. The mission is God's work. The businesses are the vehicle.

Ken said 'I've been trying to think about how to build a business around you.' That's not a compliment — that's a signal. Walk in Tuesday knowing this is two builders figuring out what building together looks like, not an interview.

The environment at Buddy's: drama, complaining, Oscar scatterbrained and not tracking things. Key 13 Shadow (Discord) is right there. Reframe: this is the systems void that makes me indispensable. Fill gaps without martyrdom. Document everything. The path through this season requires protecting my field while stacking cash.

priorities.title: Debt Negotiation
priorities.body: Contact collection agencies. Negotiate lump-sum settlements on $18k defaulted credit card. Target 40-60% off if possible.

priorities.title: Health Transformation
priorities.body: 219 → 205 lbs. Peptide protocol active. Physician consult on labs. Body is the first business.

priorities.title: Puerto Rico Trial Week
priorities.body: Schedule and execute trial week with Ken within 30 days. Experience the life before committing.
